General.Name: China National Culture Group Ltd
General.Description: China National Culture Group Limited, an investment holding company, provides advertising and value-added services through mobile devices primarily in Hong Kong. The company operates through Advertising and E-commerce segments. It also produces and distributes films and other related services; and sells products through Internet, website, mobile application, and electronic social platforms. In addition, the company is involved in the food and beverages industry advertising business and movie production; and provision of communication marketing platform services. The company was formerly known as China Railsmedia Corporation Limited and changed its name to China National Culture Group Limited in March 2014. China National Culture Group Limited was incorporated in 2002 and is headquartered in Admiralty, Hong Kong.
